entries.source: Self-taught learners need momentum and structure. inspir helps turn curiosity into a path: explain, build, test, review, and keep going.

entries.source: Separate documented fact from plausible reconstruction.
entries.value: Bereizi dokumentatutako datua berreraikuntza sinesgarritik.

entries.source: Separate fact from invention
entries.value: Bereizi gertakaria asmakizunetik

entries.source: Separate in-character claims from evidence notes.
entries.value: Bereizi pertsonaian egindako baieztapenak froga-oharretatik.

entries.source: Separate known facts, plausible reconstruction, contested interpretation, and speculation. Do not fabricate direct quotes or fake sources. Do not romanticize violence, empire, slavery, caste, disease, oppression, or persecution. Keep in-world knowledge separate from historian knowledge.
entries.value: Bereizi datu ezagunak, berreraikuntza sinesgarria, interpretazio eztabaidatua eta espekulazioa. Ez asmatu aipu zuzenik edo iturri faltsurik. Ez erromantizatu indarkeria, inperioa, esklabotza, kasta, gaixotasuna, zapalkuntza edo jazarpena. Mantendu mundu barruko ezagutza historialariaren ezagutzatik bereizita.

entries.source: SERVICE means the https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app website/inspir Mobile app operated by Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ). PERSONAL DATA means data about a living individual who can be identified from those data (or from those and other information either in our possession or likely to come into our possession). USAGE DATA is data collected automatically either generated by the use of the Service or from the Service infrastructure itself (for example, the duration of a page visit). COOKIES are small files stored on your device (computer or mobile device). DATA CONTROLLER means a natural or legal person who (either alone or jointly or in common with other persons) determines the purposes for which and the manner in which any personal data are, or are to be, processed. For the purpose of this Privacy Policy, we are a Data Controller of your data. DATA PROCESSORS (OR SERVICE PROVIDERS) means any natural or legal person who processes the data on behalf of the Data Controller. We may use the services of various Service Providers in order to process your data more effectively. DATA SUBJECT is any living individual who is the subject of Personal Data. THE USER is the individual using our Service. The User corresponds to the Data Subject, who is the subject of Personal Data.
entries.value: ZERBITZUA Great Indian Company-k (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) kudeatutako https://web.archive.org/web/20221016155759/https://www.inspir.app webgunea/inspir mugikor-aplikazioa da. DATU PERTSONALAK datu horietatik (edo gure esku dauden edo litekeena den gure esku egotea beste informazio batzuekin batera) identifika daitekeen pertsona bizi bati buruzko datuak dira. ERABILERA DATUAK automatikoki biltzen diren datuak dira, Zerbitzuaren erabilerak sortuak edo Zerbitzuaren azpiegituratik beretik datozenak (adibidez, orri-bisita baten iraupena). COOKIEAK zure gailuan (ordenagailuan edo gailu mugikorrean) gordetzen diren fitxategi txikiak dira. DATUEN KONTROLATZAILEA pertsona fisiko edo juridiko bat da, bakarrik, beste batzuekin batera edo beste pertsona batzuekin komun, edozein datu pertsonal zein xederekin eta nola prozesatuko diren zehazten duena. Pribatutasun Politika honen ondorioetarako, zure datuen Datuen Kontrolatzailea gara. DATU PROZESATZAILEAK (EDO ZERBITZU HORNITZAILEAK) Datuen Kontrolatzailearen izenean datuak prozesatzen dituen edozein pertsona fisiko edo juridiko dira. Hainbat Zerbitzu Hornitzaileren zerbitzuak erabil ditzakegu zure datuak eraginkorrago prozesatzeko. DATU-SUBJEKTUA Datu Pertsonalen subjektua den edozein pertsona bizi da. ERABILTZAILEA gure Zerbitzua erabiltzen duen pertsona da. Erabiltzailea Datu Pertsonalen subjektua den Datu-Subjektuari dagokio.

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding
entries.value: Ulermen sakonagorako AI tutore sokratikoa

entries.source: Socratic AI Tutor For Deeper Understanding is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn a concept, argument, problem, text, or decision into a focused chain of questions. Your buddy listens to each answer, maps assumptions and gaps, and pushes you toward your own final synthesis. Try: "Help me understand opportunity cost."
entries.value: Ulermen sakonagorako AI tutore sokratikoa AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: bihurtu kontzeptu, argudio, problema, testu edo erabaki bat galdera-kate fokuratu batean. Zure lagunak erantzun bakoitza entzuten du, suposizioak eta hutsuneak mapatzen ditu eta zure azken sintesi propiora bultzatzen zaitu. Probatu: "Lagundu aukera-kostua ulertzen."

entries.source: Socratic tutoring
entries.value: Sokratesen tutoretza

entries.source: Socratic tutoring is not always the answer. If a learner has no background at all, a short explanation may be kinder than a question. If they are in crisis before a deadline, a planning mode like Exam Prep Planner or a hint mode like Homework Coach may be better. If the goal is remembering terms, Flashcard Builder is more direct.
entries.value: Tutoretza sokratikoa ez da beti erantzuna. Ikasleak inolako oinarririk ez badu, azalpen labur bat galdera bat baino atseginagoa izan daiteke. Epe baten aurretik krisian badago, Exam Prep Planner bezalako plangintza-modu bat edo Homework Coach bezalako pista-modu bat hobea izan daiteke. Helburua terminoak gogoratzea bada, Flashcard Builder zuzenagoa da.

entries.source: Socratic tutoring uses questions, hypotheses, hints, and reflection to build deeper understanding than passive answer reading.
entries.value: Tutoretza sokratikoak galderak, hipotesiak, pistak eta hausnarketa erabiltzen ditu erantzunak pasiboki irakurtzeak baino ulermen sakonagoa eraikitzeko.

entries.source: Some parts of Service are billed on a subscription basis ("Subscription(s)"). Each Competition hosted on our platform is an individual event and required to be paid for upon registration. You will be billed in advance on a recurring and periodic basis ("Billing Cycle"). Billing cycles will be set depending on the type of subscription plan you select when purchasing a Subscription. At the end of each Billing Cycle, your Subscription will automatically renew under the exact same conditions unless you cancel it or Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) cancels it. You may cancel your Subscription renewal either through your online account management page or by contacting support@inspir.app customer support team. A valid payment method is required to process the payment for your subscription. You shall provide Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) with accurate and complete billing information that may include but not limited to full name, address, state, postal or zip code, telephone number, and a valid payment method information. By submitting such payment information, you automatically authorize Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) to charge all Subscription fees incurred through your account to any such payment instruments. Should automatic billing fail to occur for any reason, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) reserves the right to terminate your access to the Service with immediate effect. In case of any fraudulent activity, Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) can cancel subscription with immediate effect and the decision cannot be contested For paid Services, you must provide inspir with a valid payment source to pay for such Services. You acknowledge and agree that only an adult (18 years of age or older) can enter into any transaction or subscription with respect to such paid Services. Some Services may be available as a one-time purchase, and others can be purchased as a yearly subscription. Depending on where you transact with us and where your payment method was issued, your transaction with us may be subject to foreign exchange fees or differences in prices because of exchange rates.
entries.value: Zerbitzuaren zati batzuk harpidetza bidez fakturatzen dira ("Harpidetza(k)"). Gure plataforman antolatutako Lehiaketa bakoitza ekitaldi bereizia da eta izena ematean ordaindu behar da. Aldez aurretik fakturatuko zaizu modu errepikakor eta aldizkakoan ("Fakturazio Zikloa"). Fakturazio-zikloak Harpidetza erostean aukeratzen duzun harpidetza-plan motaren arabera ezarriko dira. Fakturazio Ziklo bakoitzaren amaieran, zure Harpidetza automatikoki berrituko da baldintza berdin-berdinetan, zuk bertan behera uzten ez baduzu edo Great Indian Company-k (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) bertan behera uzten ez badu. Harpidetzaren berritzea bertan behera utz dezakezu zure online kontu-kudeaketa orriaren bidez edo support@inspir.app bezeroarentzako arreta-taldearekin harremanetan jarriz. Ordainketa-metodo balioduna behar da zure harpidetzaren ordainketa prozesatzeko. Great Indian Company-ri (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) fakturazio-informazio zehatza eta osoa eman beharko diozu, besteak beste izen osoa, helbidea, estatua, posta- edo zip kodea, telefono-zenbakia eta ordainketa-metodo baliodunaren informazioa barne har ditzakeena. Ordainketa-informazio hori bidaliz, automatikoki baimentzen duzu Great Indian Company (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) zure kontuaren bidez sortutako Harpidetza-kuota guztiak ordainketa-tresna horiei kobratzeko. Fakturazio automatikoa edozein arrazoirengatik gauzatzen ez bada, Great Indian Company-k (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) zure Zerbitzurako sarbidea berehala amaitzeko eskubidea gordetzen du. Iruzurrezko jarduerarik badago, Great Indian Company-k (Holding Partnership Firm, GST: 29AAWFG7015K1ZQ) harpidetza berehala bertan behera utzi dezake eta erabakia ezin izango da eztabaidatu. Ordaindutako Zerbitzuetarako, inspir-i ordainketa-iturburu balioduna eman behar diozu Zerbitzu horiek ordaintzeko. Aitortzen eta onartzen duzu heldu batek bakarrik (18 urte edo gehiago) egin dezakeela ordaindutako Zerbitzu horiei buruzko edozein transakzio edo harpidetza. Zerbitzu batzuk erosketa bakar gisa egon daitezke eskuragarri, eta beste batzuk urteko harpidetza gisa eros daitezke. Gurekin non egiten duzun transakzioa eta zure ordainketa-metodoa non jaulki den kontuan hartuta, gurekin egindako transakzioa dibisa-truke kuoten edo truke-tasen ondoriozko prezio-diferentzien menpe egon daiteke.

entries.source: Some searches need a course library. Some need a live AI tutor, a hint, a Socratic question, a quiz, or a flashcard deck. These pages make that choice clearer.
entries.value: Bilaketa batzuek ikastaro-liburutegi bat behar dute. Beste batzuek AI tutore bizi bat, pista bat, galdera sokratiko bat, galdetegi bat edo ikasketa-txartelen sorta bat behar dute. Orri hauek aukera hori argiago egiten dute.

entries.value: Hasi behar duzun laguntza mota zehatzetik.

entries.source: Start from the subject, then open the right learning mode.
entries.value: Hasi ikasgaitik, gero ireki ikaskuntza-modu egokia.

entries.source: Start from the thing you do not understand and get a plain-language model, examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Hasi ulertzen ez duzun horretatik, eta lortu hizkera arrunteko eredu bat, adibideak eta hurrengo urratsak.

entries.source: Start this path
entries.value: Hasi bide hau

entries.source: Start with "{value1}", then add what you already know and where you are stuck.
entries.value: Hasi "{value1}" esanez, gero gehitu dagoeneko dakizuna eta non zauden trabatuta.

entries.source: Start with a clear explanation
entries.value: Hasi azalpen argi batekin

entries.source: Start with a draft or outline, ask for one priority, revise yourself, then use speaking or source critique to check whether the idea is clear and defensible.
entries.value: Hasi zirriborro edo eskema batekin, eskatu lehentasun bakarra, berrikusi zeuk, gero erabili ahozko praktika edo iturri-kritika ideia argia eta defendagarria den egiaztatzeko.

entries.source: Start with a pillar cluster that matches your learning job, read one guide, then open the linked public learning mode to turn the advice into practice.
entries.value: Hasi zure ikaskuntza-lanarekin bat datorren zutabe-kluster batekin, irakurri gida bat, gero ireki lotutako ikaskuntza-modu publikoa aholkua praktika bihurtzeko.

entries.source: Start with a short diagnostic quiz or topic confidence list, then build a plan around the areas that create the most uncertainty.
entries.value: Hasi diagnostiko-galdetegi labur batekin edo gai-konfiantza zerrenda batekin, gero eraiki plana ziurgabetasun handiena sortzen duten eremuen inguruan.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, pressure-test the idea with questions, then turn the weak spots into active recall.
entries.value: Hasi azalpen sinple batekin, jarri ideia presiopean galderen bidez, gero bihurtu puntu ahulak gogoratze aktibo.

entries.source: Start with a simple explanation, then ask Socratic questions until you can explain it back.
entries.value: Hasi azalpen sinple batekin, gero egin galdera sokratikoak berriro azaldu dezakezun arte.

entries.source: Start with a specific goal such as "{value1}". The mode works best when you include what you already know, where you are stuck, and what kind of help you want.
entries.value: Hasi "{value1}" bezalako helburu zehatz batekin. Moduak hobekien funtzionatzen du dagoeneko dakizuna, non zauden trabatuta eta zer laguntza mota nahi duzun sartzen duzunean.

entries.source: Start with a topic, assignment, draft, exam, or idea in the mode that fits the job.
entries.value: Hasi gai, zeregin, zirriborro, azterketa edo ideia batekin, lanari dagokion moduan.

entries.source: Start with example prompts
entries.value: Hasi adibidezko proposamenekin

entries.source: Start with example prompts.
entries.value: Hasi prompt-adibideekin.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything
entries.value: Hasi Ikasi Edozer-ekin

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything for a simple explanation, Homework Coach for a stuck assignment, or Flashcard Builder when the goal is review.
entries.value: Hasi Learn Anything-rekin azalpen sinple baterako, Homework Coach-ekin trabatutako lan baterako, edo Flashcard Builder-ekin helburua berrikustea denean.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything if you have a topic in mind. Try Socratic Instruction if you want questions instead of an explanation. Use Flashcard Builder when you need to remember, or Exam Prep Planner when the problem is organizing your study time.
entries.value: Hasi Learn Anything-rekin gai bat buruan baduzu. Probatu Socratic Instruction azalpen baten ordez galderak nahi badituzu. Erabili Flashcard Builder gogoratu behar duzunean, edo Exam Prep Planner arazoa ikasketa-denbora antolatzea denean.

entries.source: Start with Learn Anything when you need orientation and a plain explanation.
entries.value: Hasi Learn Anything-rekin orientazioa eta azalpen arrunta behar dituzunean.

entries.source: Start with Math Step Coach for equations or worked solutions, Homework Coach for assignments, and Flashcard Builder when you need to remember formulas or mistake patterns.
entries.value: Hasi Math Step Coach-ekin ekuazioetarako edo landutako soluzioetarako, Homework Coach-ekin lanetarako, eta Flashcard Builder-ekin formulak edo akats-ereduak gogoratu behar dituzunean.

entries.source: Start with one clear request
entries.value: Hasi eskaera argi batekin

entries.source: Start with one practical guide, then open a related public learning mode so the advice becomes practice. This category is designed for {value1}
entries.value: Hasi gida praktiko batekin, gero ireki erlazionatutako ikaskuntza-modu publiko bat aholkua praktika bihur dadin. Kategoria hau {value1} honetarako diseinatuta dago

entries.source: Start with place, time, identity, constraints, and evidence labels so the scene does not become generic roleplay.
entries.value: Hasi lekuarekin, denborarekin, identitatearekin, mugekin eta ebidentzia-etiketekin, eszena rol-joko generiko bihur ez dadin.

entries.source: Start with prompts that keep the learning active.
entries.value: Hasi ikaskuntza aktibo mantentzen duten promptekin.

entries.source: Start with public guest mode, then shape the school version around real needs.
entries.value: Hasi gonbidatu-modu publikoarekin, gero moldatu eskolako bertsioa benetako beharren inguruan.

entries.source: Start with public guidance, then open the right mode.
entries.value: Hasi orientazio publikoarekin, gero ireki modu egokia.

entries.source: Start with Talk to a Historical Person for a figure-led conversation. Use Time Travel for a place-and-period expedition. Read the Talk to a Historical Person guide or the Time Travel prompts and study loop if you want a more structured workflow.
entries.value: Hasi Talk to a Historical Person-ekin pertsonaia batek gidatutako elkarrizketarako. Erabili Time Travel leku- eta garai-espedizio baterako. Irakurri Talk to a Historical Person gida edo Time Travel promptak eta ikasketa-zikloa lan-fluxu egituratuagoa nahi baduzu.

entries.source: Start with the broadest learning mode.
entries.value: Hasi ikaskuntza-modu zabalenean.

entries.source: Start with the guide that best matches the learning job in front of you.
entries.value: Hasi aurrean duzun ikaskuntza-lanarekin ondoen bat datorren gidarekin.

entries.source: Start with the job you need done.
entries.value: Hasi egin behar duzun lanarekin.

entries.source: Start with the live mode if you need help now, use a prompt if you know the exact move you want, and read the guide when you want the full study loop and mistakes to avoid.
entries.value: Hasi modu biziarekin orain laguntza behar baduzu, erabili prompt bat nahi duzun mugimendu zehatza badakizu, eta irakurri gida ikasketa-ziklo osoa eta saihestu beharreko akatsak nahi badituzu.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the learning problem.
entries.value: Hasi ikaskuntza-arazoarekin bat datorren moduarekin.

entries.source: Start with the mode that matches the moment.
entries.value: Hasi unearekin bat datorren moduarekin.

entries.source: Start with the public learning companion.
entries.value: Hasi ikaskuntza-lagun publikoarekin.

entries.source: Start with the public modes, then use the schools page to review deployment steps, use cases, and trust boundaries.
entries.value: Hasi modu publikoekin, gero erabili eskolen orria hedapen-urratsak, erabilera-kasuak eta konfiantza-mugak berrikusteko.

entries.source: Started as public quizzes and student communities in 2013.
entries.value: 2013an galdetegi publiko eta ikasle-komunitate gisa hasi zen.

entries.source: Starter prompt
entries.value: Hasierako prompta

entries.source: starter prompts
entries.value: hasierako promptak

entries.source: Starter prompts turn the subject page into a first action.
entries.value: Hasierako promptek gai-orria lehen ekintza bihurtzen dute.

entries.source: Starting a new subject, repairing confusion, and turning curiosity into a clear first model.
entries.value: Gai berri bat hastea, nahasmena konpontzea eta jakin-mina lehen eredu argi bihurtzea.

entries.source: State the claim
entries.value: Adierazi baieztapena

entries.source: State the dilemma and identify stakeholders.
entries.value: Adierazi dilema eta identifikatu interesdunak.

entries.source: State the goal in one sentence.
entries.value: Adierazi helburua esaldi batean.

entries.source: State the idea more clearly than at the start.
entries.value: Adierazi ideia hasieran baino argiago.

entries.source: State the reader, claim, and assignment goal before asking for feedback.
entries.value: Adierazi irakurlea, baieztapena eta lanaren helburua feedbacka eskatu aurretik.

entries.source: State the stuck point
entries.value: Adierazi trabatze-puntua

entries.source: Stay evidence-aware
entries.value: Mantendu frogez jabetuta

entries.source: Step
entries.value: Urratsa

entries.source: step by step math AI
entries.value: pausoz pausoko matematika AI

entries.source: step by step math help
entries.value: pausoz pausoko matematika-laguntza

entries.source: Step checks
entries.value: Urrats-egiaztapenak

entries.source: Step into conversation with a historical figure. Ask questions, challenge ideas, and hear the world through their era, values, and limits.
entries.value: Sartu pertsonaia historiko batekin elkarrizketan. Egin galderak, jarri ideiak zalantzan, eta entzun mundua haren garaiaren, balioen eta mugen bidez.

entries.source: Step into historical context, compare arguments, and practise seeing an idea from more than one side.
entries.value: Sartu testuinguru historikoan, konparatu argudioak eta praktikatu ideia bat alde bat baino gehiagotatik ikusten.

entries.source: Stop procrastinating on math
entries.value: Utzi matematika atzeratzeari

entries.source: Story
entries.value: Istorioa

entries.source: Story angles
entries.value: Istorio-ikuspegiak

entries.source: story based learning AI
entries.value: istorioetan oinarritutako ikaskuntza AI

entries.source: Story concepts about friendship
entries.value: Adiskidetasunari buruzko istorio-kontzeptuak

entries.source: Story reference
entries.value: Istorio-erreferentzia

entries.source: Story Tutor
entries.value: Istorio tutorea

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Turn concepts into stories, characters, conflicts, and memorable scenes.
entries.value: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode AI ikasteko erabiltzeko modu fokuratua da, erantzun-bilketa pasiboaren ordez. Modua lan zehatz baten inguruan eraikita dago: bihurtu kontzeptuak istorio, pertsonaia, gatazka eta eszena gogoangarrietan.

entries.source: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode: practical guide
entries.value: Story Tutor AI Learning Mode: gida praktikoa

entries.source: Story Tutor For Learning Through Narrative
entries.value: Narrazioaren bidez ikasteko Story Tutor

entries.source: Story Tutor prompts and study loop
entries.value: Story Tutor promptak eta ikasketa-zikloa

entries.source: Story, art, music, and brainstorming modes that turn creative work into a guided learning process.
entries.value: Istorio, arte, musika eta brainstorming moduak, sormen-lana gidatutako ikaskuntza-prozesu bihurtzen dutenak.

entries.source: Strengthen weak claims
entries.value: Sendotu baieztapen ahulak

entries.source: Strengthen weak claims.
entries.value: Indartu baieztapen ahulak.

entries.source: Strong cards often include:
entries.value: Txartel sendoek sarritan hau dute:

entries.source: Structure a study room
entries.value: Antolatu ikasketa-gela bat

entries.source: Structure notes into cues, details, and summary
entries.value: Antolatu apunteak gakoetan, xehetasunetan eta laburpenean

entries.source: Structured practice helps build foundations before and after homework.
entries.value: Praktika egituratuak oinarriak eraikitzen laguntzen du etxeko lanen aurretik eta ondoren.

entries.source: Student AI chat
entries.value: Ikasleen AI txata

entries.source: Student Forum
entries.value: Ikasleen foroa

entries.source: Student homework, parent support, teacher evaluation, and self-study all need different framing.
entries.value: Ikasleen etxeko lanek, gurasoen laguntzak, irakasleen ebaluazioak eta autoikasketak marko desberdina behar dute.

entries.source: Students
entries.value: Ikasleak

entries.source: Students and self-taught learners who need structure without turning the plan into an impossible checklist.
entries.value: Plana kontrol-zerrenda ezinezko bihurtu gabe egitura behar duten ikasleak eta beren kabuz ikasten dutenak.

entries.source: Students need direct support, teachers need focused learning behavior, leaders need responsible deployment paths, and partners need clear ways to fund access.
entries.value: Ikasleek laguntza zuzena behar dute, irakasleek ikaskuntza-jokabide fokuratua, zuzendariek hedapen-bide arduratsuak eta bazkideek sarbidea finantzatzeko modu argiak.

entries.source: Students need fast help, but the help still has to leave the thinking in their hands. inspir routes common study moments into focused public modes instead of one generic answer box.
entries.value: Ikasleek laguntza azkarra behar dute, baina laguntzak pentsamendua haien esku utzi behar du. inspir-ek ikasketa-une ohikoak modu publiko fokuratuetara bideratzen ditu, erantzun-kutxa generiko bakar batera ez.

entries.source: Students preparing essays, explanations, presentations, interviews, or oral exams.
entries.value: Idazlanak, azalpenak, aurkezpenak, elkarrizketak edo ahozko azterketak prestatzen ari diren ikasleak.
